mapper.sql: comment_id, user_id, novel_id, chapter_id, parent_id, content, like_count, reply_count, status, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM comment WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND parent_id = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT
FROM comment WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT
FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT
FROM comment WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND parent_id = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND like_count > 0
UPDATE comment SET reply_count = reply_count - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND reply_count > 0
mapper.delete:
UPDATE comment SET deleted = 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE comment_id IN
#{commentId}
